allow: Bash(adb -s emulator-5554 shell monkey -p com.sfit.sfit_app -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} | size %{size_download} | header cf-mitigated: %header{cf-mitigated}\\n" -X POST "https://sfit.ecosdelseo.com/api/auth/login" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json" -H "X-Sfit-Client: sfit-mob-7f3a9b2c4d6e8f1a3b5c7d9e0f2a4b6c" -d '{"email":"ciudadano@sfit.test","password":"Sfit2026!"}')

Bash(curl -sS -X POST "https://sfit.ecosdelseo.com/api/auth/login" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json" -H "X-Sfit-Client: sfit-mob-7f3a9b2c4d6e8f1a3b5c7d9e0f2a4b6c" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Linux; Android 13\)" -d '{"email":"ciudadano@sfit.test","password":"Sfit2026!"}' -D - -o /tmp/body.txt -w "\\n--- final HTTP: %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d['data']['items']; print\(f'total={d[\\"data\\"][\\"total\\"]}, en vista={len\(items\)}'\); [print\(f'  - {i[\\"razonSocial\\"]} | RUC {i[\\"ruc\\"]} | scope={i[\\"serviceScope\\"]} | sede={i[\\"headquarters\\"][\\"name\\"] if i[\\"headquarters\\"] else \\"none\\"}'\) for i in items]")
